ddls:
CREATE TABLE "capacity_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp for the data entry */,
  "nominal_capacity" INTEGER /* Nominal capacity for the transportation mode */,
  "actual_tonnes" INTEGER /* Actual tonnes transported */,
  "percent_difference" REAL /* Percentage difference between nominal and actual capacity */,
  "percent_difference_positive" REAL /* Percentage difference positive value indicating improvement */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route used for the transportation */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the logistics center involved */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver operating the transport */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during transportation */,
  "load_type" TEXT /* Type of load being transported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_data_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_data_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES logistics_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transport mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transport mode (e.g., truck, ship, plane) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transport mode */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the transport mode */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the transport mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the route */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the route */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transport mode used for this route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "estimated_duration" REAL /* Estimated duration to complete the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES transport_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logistics_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logistics center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the logistics center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the logistics center */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager responsible for the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the driver */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the driver has been working */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the driver based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the performance metrics */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total nominal capacity for the day */,
  "total_actual" INTEGER /* Total actual tonnes transported for the day */,
  "overall_difference" REAL /* Overall difference in performance for the day */,
  "average_utilization" REAL /* Average utilization rate of capacity */,
  "number_of_delays" INTEGER /* Number of delays recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user's account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view report, edit data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low capacity, over capacity) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the forecasted capacity */,
  "predicted_capacity" INTEGER /* Predicted nominal capacity for the date */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (0-1) */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used for the forecast */,
  "historical_accuracy" REAL /* Historical accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)
